targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '1h') AS time, count(*) AS searches FROM search_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Zero-result rate
panels.description: Share of searches that returned no hits (hit_count = 0) over the selected range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT 100.0 * avg((hit_count = 0)::int) AS zero_result_pct FROM search_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT count(*) AS total FROM search_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)

panels.title: Search latency p50 / p95 / p99 (ms)
panels.description: Server-side processing_ms percentiles. Drives the 'search p95 > 2s' alert.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(created_at, '1h') AS time, percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY processing_ms) AS p50, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY processing_ms) AS p95, percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY processing_ms) AS p99 FROM search_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND processing_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Top 20 queries (range)
panels.description: Most frequent queries with average latency and zero-result share.

targets.rawSql: SELECT query, count(*) AS searches, round(avg(processing_ms)) AS avg_ms, round(100.0 * avg((hit_count = 0)::int), 1) AS zero_pct FROM search_analytics WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY query ORDER BY searches DESC LIMIT 20
